{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322022305DD0D663DE9BA229E55FE"}"},"total":3268},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7577832900348330776","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"认真评价！虽然这本书，不是我喜欢的类型。但是，作者的写作水平很高！真的很高！我一般很少评价别人的写作水平。只是在看了这本书后，真的想给作者点个赞。因为，能看的出来，作者对这本书下的苦心，没有在糊弄读者。每一个人物的刻画，性格都十分的饱满，剧情具有特色！这是我最喜欢的一点，看的时候，就好像在看一个真的人一样，而不是其它小说里的那种无脑或者人机一样的配角。唯一美中不足的就是评分有点低，个人目测9分以上，我支持这本小说！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764354330,"group_id":"7510091796857244697","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"韩菲，站在原地别动，我一定，会找到你的","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6RvnQ8wMIJL3Lmv+mFumS18fDUL7Pt6yD7MUCZbD1eK","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f5dd1b3d5aed4e9baa1365b89c96be9f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776710683&x-signature=hmzBhfv5imdgmc8vamwOpOV87Y8%3D","user_id":"2374568338013661","user_name":"间懵"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2374568338013661","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7510091796857244697","book_info":{"abstract":"一生跌宕起伏历经坎坷的高阳高老爷子好不容易在古稀之年才安稳下来，结果却被视频里美女主播的一句“此生必驾318”洗脑了，毅然决然的骑着摩托就奔向了布达拉。
然而没等出城便因逆行迎面遇上了根本刹不住的百吨重载王！
随着噗的一声，连一具全尸都没留下的高阳带着记忆重生到了古代平行世界，并且标配每日签到系统。
可天胡开局的高阳却在新手大礼包的问题上同系统起了争执。原本系统让高阳随机抽取两个数字任意组合，组合出来的数字就是每日签到所获物品的量值，极值为99。
不曾想抽出5和7的高阳却不按常理出牌，硬是当着系统的面摆出了 5⁷（5的7次方），合算出来后每日签到所获物品的最终量值是78125。
系统自觉被耍，亡羊补牢下临时给高阳出台了一部《未成年宿主保护法》，其中明确规定未满18周岁的宿主只拥有系统签到权，并无签到奖励使用权。签到所获奖励暂存系统空间，待宿主年满18周岁后方可任意提取！注:保护期内宿主如罹难，系统有权收回空间内一切物品！
“叮！恭喜宿主获得护舒宝日用特惠装一包，注:新手大礼包Buff以叠加，请宿主查收！
望着空间里的78125包卫生巾，高阳陷入了沉思！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/867fc9ec3dca51adfe3a3f911e0d5041","author":"老高老了","author_id":"","book_id":"7510091796857244697","book_name":"重生即无敌的我被系统锁了十八年","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#100808","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7510575632984588824","read_count":"76805","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1209680"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.9","serial_count":"570","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,系统,重生,架空,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/41c52ea494f1be68925175ab912dadb4~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779301385&x-signature=kn5BJfXpYtnfbzEbpY%2FfG2HL2ws%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2418520736937790","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"81"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322022305DD0D663DE9BA229E55FE"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":26,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":6102,"reply_count":8,"show_pv":26086},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7567806299695465241","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书真的很好看，尤其是在描写吕布为了貂蝉跟孙悟空大战几百回合，但是薛宝钗确实太强了，要不是有诺手一个外圈挂+诺克萨斯断头台，这波m4六倍扫射必死，除此之外，我比较欣赏诸葛亮对花果山108个猴子说的一句话“小伙一身傲骨别在你亮哥面前摆谱”，表现出诸葛亮对猴子三棒敲死他的愤慨，总而言之，这本书情节有趣，体系明确，伏笔众多，打斗场面如身临其境，人物性格描述很到位!","text_exts":[{"e":25,"s":22,"text":"孙悟空","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%AD%99%E6%82%9F%E7%A9%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774117385229E55FE%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227567806299695465241%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227510091796857244697%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%AD%99%E6%82%9F%E7%A9%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1762020429,"group_id":"7510091796857244697","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2pqoQUFEenaLZitlbJrOAaPe84NGujKB4DMbxst+FC2","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3200013794288633","user_name":"戊堡的马提风"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3200013794288633","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7510091796857244697","book_info":{"abstract":"一生跌宕起伏历经坎坷的高阳高老爷子好不容易在古稀之年才安稳下来，结果却被视频里美女主播的一句“此生必驾318”洗脑了，毅然决然的骑着摩托就奔向了布达拉。
